title: elaeocarpus nouhuysii
intro: Elaeocarpus nouhuysii, also known as the Nouhuys' blue berry tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Elaeocarpaceae. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Elaeocarpus nouhuysii include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Elaeocarpus nouhuysii is often prepared as a tea or infused in hot water to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
